mano_cua.result_summary: useLocalStorage hook首次渲染时不将初始值写入localStorage。页面正确显示初始值100，但localStorage.getItem返回null。只有用户交互后localStorage才写入。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: useLocalStorage hook has a bug: initial value (100) is only kept in React memory state but never persisted to localStorage on first render. localStorage.getItem('demo-notification-count') returns null after initial render. Only after user interaction (clicking badge to clear notifications) does localStorage get written (value '0').
